plus.terms.title: Subscription Terms
plus.terms.s1.title: Auto-renewal
plus.terms.s1.body: Subscription renews automatically every month. Funds are charged on the renewal date. You can cancel at any time in settings — cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period.
plus.terms.s2.title: Payment
plus.terms.s2.body: Payment is processed in the local currency. Upon charging you will receive a notification via the linked payment method. We do not store card data — payments are processed via a secure payment gateway.
plus.terms.s3.title: Refunds
plus.terms.s3.body: Refunds are available within 3 days of payment if you have not yet used the subscription benefits. Contact Xalle support to request a refund.
plus.terms.s4.title: Changes to Terms
plus.terms.s4.body: Xalle may change pricing and subscription terms with at least 30 days prior notice. Continued use of the service after notice constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
plus.terms.s5.title: Termination
plus.terms.s5.body: Xalle reserves the right to suspend or terminate a subscription in case of a violation of the platform's Terms of Use without refund of the remaining period.
plus.buy.title: Buy Sparks
plus.buy.demo: Demo mode — Sparks are credited immediately without a real payment.
plus.buy.processing.title: Crediting Sparks…
plus.buy.done.title: Sparks credited!
plus.gift.title: Gift a subscription
plus.gift.confirm.title: Gift confirmation
plus.gift.terms: Subscription activates immediately. Sparks will be deducted from your balance and are non-refundable.
plus.gift.done.title: Gift sent!
plus.payModal.title: Subscribe

plus.payModal.redirect.desc: After clicking the button you will be redirected to confirm the payment.
plus.payModal.secure: 🔒 Payment secured. Data is not stored.
